ucs.title: [LLM] Volt Typhoon NTDS.dit extraction via ntdsutil IFM / vssadmin shadow copy
ucs.description: Hunts the exact credential-theft chain CISA AA24-038A attributes to Volt Typhoon (VOLTZITE / Vanguard Panda): use of the built-in Windows ntdsutil 'IFM / create full' subcommand and/or vssadmin shadow-copy creation on a domain controller, followed by handling of ntds.dit via esentutl. This is one of VT's signature LOTL behaviours for offline DC database theft and avoids dropping Mimikatz on disk.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=false count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("ntdsutil.exe","vssadmin.exe","esentutl.exe","diskshadow.exe","wbadmin.exe") AND (Processes.process IN ("*create full*","*ac in ntds*","*activate instance ntds*","*ifm*","*create shadow*","*ntds.dit*","*/y*","*systemroot*\\NTDS*","*set context persistent nowriters*")) AND NOT (Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE"))) by host Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_hash | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest as DomainController | eval signature=case(match(process,"(?i)ifm|ac in ntds|activate instance ntds"),"ntdsutil_IFM", match(process,"(?i)create shadow"),"vssadmin_shadow", match(process,"(?i)ntds\.dit"),"esentutl_ntds", true(),"other") | stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime values(signature) as signatures values(process) as cmdlines values(parent_process_name) as parents dc(signature) as signature_count by DomainController user | where signature_count>=1 | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
let lookback = 14d;
let ntds_signals = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where AccountName !in~ ("system","local service","network service")
    | extend cmd = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
    | where (FileName =~ "ntdsutil.exe"   and cmd has_any ("ifm","ac in ntds","activate instance ntds","create full"))
         or (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe"  and cmd has "create shadow")
         or (FileName =~ "diskshadow.exe" and cmd has_any ("set context persistent nowriters","add volume","expose %","-s "))
         or (FileName =~ "esentutl.exe"  and (cmd has "ntds.dit" or cmd has " /y "))
         or (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe"   and cmd has "start backup" and cmd has "ntds")
         or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and cmd has_any ("win32_shadowcopy","ntdsutil","ntds.dit"))
    | extend Signature = case(
        FileName =~ "ntdsutil.exe", "ntdsutil_IFM",
        FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe", "vssadmin_shadow",
        FileName =~ "diskshadow.exe", "diskshadow_script",
        FileName =~ "esentutl.exe", "esentutl_ntds",
        FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe", "wbadmin_ntds",
        "powershell_vss");
// Optional file-side corroboration: ntds.dit being written outside its normal path
let ntds_files = DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
    | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed")
    | where FileName in~ ("ntds.dit","system","security")
    | where FolderPath !startswith @"C:\Windows\NTDS"
    | project FileTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName,
              DroppedFile = strcat(FolderPath, FileName),
              DropParent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              DropCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
ntds_signals
| summarize SignatureCount = dcount(Signature),
            Signatures   = make_set(Signature),
            CmdLines     = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 25),
            Parents      = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName),
            FirstSeen    = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen     = max(Timestamp)
            by DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountDomain
| join kind=leftouter (
    ntds_files
    | summarize DroppedFiles = make_set(DroppedFile), FileDropTime = max(FileTime) by DeviceId
  ) on DeviceId
| extend HasFileCorroboration = isnotempty(DroppedFiles)
| where SignatureCount >= 1
| project FirstSeen, LastSeen, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountDomain,
          SignatureCount, Signatures, Parents, CmdLines,
          HasFileCorroboration, DroppedFiles
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let lookback = 14d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID == 4688
| where AccountType == "User"
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend ImageLower = tolower(NewProcessName), CmdLower = tolower(CommandLine)
| where (ImageLower endswith "\\ntdsutil.exe"   and CmdLower has_any ("ifm","ac in ntds","activate instance ntds","create full"))
     or (ImageLower endswith "\\vssadmin.exe"   and CmdLower has "create shadow")
     or (ImageLower endswith "\\diskshadow.exe" and CmdLower has_any ("set context persistent nowriters","add volume","expose %"))
     or (ImageLower endswith "\\esentutl.exe"   and (CmdLower has "ntds.dit" or CmdLower has " /y "))
     or (ImageLower endswith "\\wbadmin.exe"    and CmdLower has "start backup" and CmdLower has "ntds")
     or (ImageLower has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe") and CmdLower has_any ("win32_shadowcopy","ntdsutil","ntds.dit"))
| extend Signature = case(
    ImageLower endswith "\\ntdsutil.exe",  "ntdsutil_IFM",
    ImageLower endswith "\\vssadmin.exe",  "vssadmin_shadow",
    ImageLower endswith "\\diskshadow.exe","diskshadow_script",
    ImageLower endswith "\\esentutl.exe",  "esentutl_ntds",
    ImageLower endswith "\\wbadmin.exe",   "wbadmin_ntds",
    "powershell_vss")
| summarize SignatureCount = dcount(Signature),
            Signatures   = make_set(Signature),
            CmdLines     = make_set(CommandLine, 25),
            Parents      = make_set(ParentProcessName),
            FirstSeen    = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen     = max(TimeGenerated)
            by Computer, Account, AccountDomain
| where SignatureCount >= 1
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Volt Typhoon - NTDS.dit Theft via ntdsutil IFM / VSS Shadow
id: 6f3a7b91-2c9d-4a4b-9c7e-volttyphoon-ntds
status: experimental
description: Detects the Volt Typhoon credential-theft chain — ntdsutil IFM, vssadmin shadow creation, diskshadow scripted snapshots, esentutl on ntds.dit, or PowerShell Win32_ShadowCopy invocations on a domain controller (CISA AA24-038A).
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa24-038a
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/13
tags:
  - attack.credential_access
  - attack.t1003.003
  - attack.t1059.003
  - attack.g1017
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  ntdsutil:
    Image|endswith: '\ntdsutil.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'ifm'
      - 'ac in ntds'
      - 'activate instance ntds'
      - 'create full'
  vssadmin:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains: 'create shadow'
  diskshadow:
    Image|endswith: '\diskshadow.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'set context persistent nowriters'
      - 'add volume'
      - 'expose %'
  esentutl:
    Image|endswith: '\esentutl.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'ntds.dit'
      - ' /y '
  powershell_vss:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'Win32_ShadowCopy'
      - 'ntdsutil'
      - 'ntds.dit'
  filter_machine:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: (ntdsutil or vssadmin or diskshadow or esentutl or powershell_vss) and not filter_machine
falsepositives:
  - Sanctioned DC backup tooling (e.g. ADBackup, scheduled VSS jobs from backup vendors) — baseline and allow-list the service accounts that run them.
level: high
ucs.rationale: Volt Typhoon (G1017 / VOLTZITE / Vanguard Panda) is documented in CISA AA24-038A as relying almost exclusively on living-off-the-land binaries — they deliberately avoid Mimikatz on disk. Their signature DC credential-theft chain is `ntdsutil "ac in ntds" "ifm" "create full c:\windows\temp\<x>" q q`, followed by `vssadmin create shadow /for=C:` and use of esentutl/wbadmin to handle ntds.dit. The co
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] Volt Typhoon Windows Security event-log harvesting for logon mapping (4624 enumeration)
ucs.description: Hunts Volt Typhoon's distinctive pre-lateral-movement reconnaissance pattern: scraping the local Security event log (specifically EventID 4624 / 4625 / 4648) via PowerShell Get-EventLog, wevtutil qe, or WMI Win32_NTLogEvent and exporting to CSV/text under C:\Users\Public or C:\Windows\Temp. CISA/NSA/FBI AA24-038A and Microsoft (Volt Typhoon) and CrowdStrike (Vanguard Panda) all call out this exact behaviour as the actor's way of mapping account-to-host relationships before kerberoasting / pass-the-hash inside critical-infrastructure environments.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=false count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","wevtutil.exe","wmic.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe") AND ((Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND (Processes.process IN ("*Get-EventLog*Security*","*Get-WinEvent*Security*","*Win32_NTLogEvent*","*get-wmiobject*ntlogevent*","*gwmi*ntlogevent*")) AND Processes.process IN ("*4624*","*4625*","*4648*","*instanceid*4624*","*export-csv*","*out-file*","*>*\\users\\public*","*>*\\windows\\temp*","*addhours*","*adddays*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wevtutil.exe" AND Processes.process IN ("*qe Security*","*qe security*","*EventID=4624*","*Event/System[EventID*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process IN ("*ntlogevent*","*NTLogEvent*"))) AND NOT (Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE")) by host Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rex field=process "(?i)(?<targeted_eid>4624|4625|4648)" | rex field=process "(?i)(?<export_path>[A-Za-z]:\\\\(users\\\\public|windows\\\\temp|programdata)[^\"\\s]*)" | stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime values(targeted_eid) as TargetedEventIDs values(export_path) as ExportPaths values(process) as CmdLines values(parent_process_name) as Parents by dest user process_name | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
let lookback = 14d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where AccountName !in~ ("system","local service","network service")
| extend cmd = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
| where (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
            and cmd has_any ("get-eventlog","get-winevent","win32_ntlogevent","gwmi","get-wmiobject")
            and cmd has "security"
            and cmd has_any ("4624","4625","4648","instanceid","-logname security","logfile='security'"))
     or (FileName =~ "wevtutil.exe"
            and cmd has_any ("qe security","query-events security")
            and cmd has_any ("eventid=4624","eventid=4625","eventid=4648","event/system[eventid"))
     or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe"
            and cmd has "ntlogevent"
            and cmd has_any ("eventcode=4624","eventcode=4625","logfile='security'","logfile=\"security\""))
| extend HarvestSink = extract(@"(?i)([a-z]:\\(?:users\\public|windows\\temp|programdata|perflogs)[^\"\s]*)", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| extend HasTimeBoundedQuery = cmd has_any ("addhours","adddays","-after ","timecreated")
| extend HasExportToFile     = cmd has_any ("export-csv","out-file","set-content",">"," | tee ")
| summarize EventCount = count(),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen  = max(Timestamp),
            CmdLines  = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 20),
            Parents   = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName),
            HarvestSinks = make_set(HarvestSink),
            TimeBounded  = max(HasTimeBoundedQuery),
            FileExports  = max(HasExportToFile)
            by DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName
// Score: a single ad-hoc 4624 query is ~hunting tier; add export-to-public OR time-window filter to escalate to alerting.
| extend Score = toint(TimeBounded) + toint(FileExports) + toint(array_length(HarvestSinks) > 0)
| where Score >= 1 or EventCount >= 2
| order by Score desc, LastSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let lookback = 14d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID == 4688
| where AccountType == "User"
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend ImageLower = tolower(NewProcessName), CmdLower = tolower(CommandLine)
| where (ImageLower has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe")
            and CmdLower has_any ("get-eventlog","get-winevent","win32_ntlogevent","gwmi","get-wmiobject")
            and CmdLower has "security"
            and CmdLower has_any ("4624","4625","4648","instanceid","-logname security","logfile='security'"))
     or (ImageLower endswith "\\wevtutil.exe"
            and CmdLower has_any ("qe security","query-events security")
            and CmdLower has_any ("eventid=4624","eventid=4625","eventid=4648","event/system[eventid"))
     or (ImageLower endswith "\\wmic.exe"
            and CmdLower has "ntlogevent"
            and CmdLower has_any ("eventcode=4624","eventcode=4625","logfile='security'"))
| extend HasTimeBound = CmdLower has_any ("addhours","adddays","-after ","timecreated")
| extend HasExport    = CmdLower has_any ("export-csv","out-file","set-content"," > ")
| extend HarvestSink  = extract(@"(?i)([a-z]:\\(?:users\\public|windows\\temp|programdata|perflogs)[^\"\s]*)", 1, CommandLine)
| summarize EventCount   = count(),
            FirstSeen    = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen     = max(TimeGenerated),
            CmdLines     = make_set(CommandLine, 20),
            Parents      = make_set(ParentProcessName),
            HarvestSinks = make_set(HarvestSink),
            TimeBounded  = max(HasTimeBound),
            FileExports  = max(HasExport)
            by Computer, Account, NewProcessName
| extend Score = toint(TimeBounded) + toint(FileExports) + toint(array_length(HarvestSinks) > 0)
| where Score >= 1 or EventCount >= 2
| order by Score desc, LastSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Volt Typhoon - Security Event Log Harvesting for 4624 Logon Mapping
id: 8c2e1d34-9b7f-4a1e-b6d2-volttyphoon-evtharvest
status: experimental
description: Detects Volt Typhoon's distinctive pre-lateral-movement reconnaissance — querying the local Security event log for 4624/4625/4648 events via Get-EventLog, Get-WinEvent, wevtutil qe, or Win32_NTLogEvent, typically writing results to C:\Users\Public or C:\Windows\Temp (CISA AA24-038A).
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa24-038a
  - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2023/05/24/volt-typhoon-targets-us-critical-infrastructure-with-living-off-the-land-techniques/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/13
tags:
  - attack.discovery
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1047
  - attack.t1033
  - attack.t1018
  - attack.g1017
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  ps_evtlog:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'Security'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'Get-EventLog'
      - 'Get-WinEvent'
      - 'Win32_NTLogEvent'
      - 'gwmi'
      - 'Get-WmiObject'
  ps_target_eid:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '4624'
      - '4625'
      - '4648'
      - 'instanceid'
  wevtutil:
    Image|endswith: '\wevtutil.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'qe Security'
      - 'qe security'
      - 'query-events security'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'EventID=4624'
  wmic_ntlog:
    Image|endswith: '\wmic.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'ntlogevent'
      - 'EventCode=4624'
  filter_machine:
    User|endswith: '$'
  filter_legit_admin:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\MMC.exe'
      - '\mmc.exe'
  condition: ((ps_evtlog and ps_target_eid) or wevtutil or wmic_ntlog) and not (filter_machine or filter_legit_admin)
falsepositives:
  - Splunk Universal Forwarder / Sentinel AMA enumerating Security log — baseline by parent process and signer.
  - Sanctioned forensic tooling (KAPE, Velociraptor) — allow-list known IR collectors.
level: high
ucs.rationale: Get-EventLog / Get-WinEvent / Win32_NTLogEvent queries scoped explicitly to the Security log AND to EventID 4624 (or 4625/4648) is the actor-defining recon move documented for Volt Typhoon by CISA AA24-038A, Microsoft (Volt Typhoon report, May 2023) and CrowdStrike (Vanguard Panda). Legitimate admins almost never script this with a time-bound (`addhours(-24)`) plus an export to C:\Users\Public or

_field_issues.message: `HasTimeBoundedQuery` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`HasExportToFile` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.

_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
